rationale: Coherence audit revealed C26 status claimed completion but code was never pushed. BUG-035 and BUG-036 still present in codebase. Fixed both for real this time. Added BiomeRadial hover info panel: CRT-styled tooltip with full biome name, guardian, season, difficulty label, and maturity progress bar. Panel uses biome accent colors, scanline overlay, and viewport-clamped positioning.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C27: verify hover panel edge cases (threshold=0 biome, all locked, smallest viewport). Feature candidates: end-run screen polish (show faction deltas + Anam earned), or minigame integration wiring (connect minigame_system to card encounter flow).
